EcosystemReadiness.title: Complete your ecosystem to unlock financing
EcosystemReadiness.subtitle: Onboard your service providers and workforce and secure insurance — it is the condition for accessing TourStack financing.
EcosystemReadiness.eligibleBody: Your ecosystem is onboarded and insured — you can apply for financing.

hero.imageAlt: High-energy live concert crowd at night with vibrant stage lights and raised hands
hero.title: Concert & Touring as a <spanTag>Service.</spanTag>
hero.description: TourStack by Ckrowd connects concert & festival promoters with artiste management companies. Plan live music with confidence — from discovery to execution.

why.title: Built for the Touring Business
why.description: A dedicated platform for the entire touring ecosystem — Promoters, Artiste Management, Service Providers, Banks, Insurance, and Workforce.

centralized.title: Centralized Touring Workflow
centralized.desc: Manage every stage of tour planning in one place — from discovery to execution. No fragmented spreadsheets, no missed messages.

matching.title: Smart Promoter–Artiste Matching
matching.desc: Rule-based matching connects promoters with artistes based on date availability, venue capacity, and budget alignment.

dataDriven.title: Data-Driven Event Planning
dataDriven.desc: Generate business summaries with estimated revenue, cost projections, and risk notes — structured for financiers from day one.

financing.title: Financing & Insurance Support
financing.desc: Track financing requirements, connect with capital partners, and unlock insurance backing to scale ambitious live experiences.

promoters.title: Join the Pan-African Tour Circuit.
promoters.description: Become part of a structured, continent-wide touring network. Discover top-tier artistes, submit formal Expressions of Interest, and access financing support to bring ambitious shows to life.

features.stop: Show interest in being part of a Tour Stop
features.discovery: Discover and submit EOIs for top-tier artistes
features.financing: State financing needs for your concert or festival
features.alignment: Streamline planning and align with other Tour Promoters

promoters.imageAlt: Music producer working on a sophisticated digital soundboard in an orange-lit studio

artists.title: Expand into New Markets.
artists.description: State your touring intent, get matched with serious promoters, and receive structured high-quality booking requests. Reduce friction and grow with confidence across new territories.

features.intent: State interest to tour and set your availability window
features.matching: Get matched with verified, serious promoters
features.alignment: Align on tour dates and expand into new markets

artists.imageAlt: Solo artist performing with intense emotion on a smoke-filled stage under a single bright spotlight

announcement.title: Ckrowd Announces Tour & Artistes
announcement.desc: Admin creates a Tour Project on TourStack — including artiste roster, fee range, availability dates, and technical requirements.

submission.title: Promoter Submits Expression of Interest
submission.desc: Promoters browse available artistes and tours, then submit a formal EOI with their venue, date, budget, and funding model.

matching.title: Matching & Review
matching.desc: TourStack scores each EOI against artiste requirements. Ckrowd team reviews flagged matches and makes informed decisions.

decision.title: Report & Decision
decision.desc: The system generates a business summary — estimated revenue, costs, and risk notes — structured for financiers. Admin approves, rejects, or requests revision.

cta.title: Ready to Take the Stage?
cta.description: Join TourStack and become part of the Pan-African touring ecosystem. Whether you're a promoter, artiste management company, or service provider — this is your platform.

hero.title:
Insurance for Every Role.

Built Into the Pipeline.
hero.description: SanlamAllianz-powered coverage embedded in the CTaaS certification pipeline — activating automatically as you onboard.

cta.title: Ready to activate your coverage?
cta.description: Complete CTaaS certification and insurance activates automatically.

previewNotice.title: This is a preview of the onboarding journey
previewNotice.description: To start your actual registration and submit verification documents, continue to the secure intake form.

activates.title: Insurance Activates at This Step
activates.description: SanlamAllianz coverage activates automatically upon certification completion. No separate application required.

finance.title: Finance Products Unlocked
finance.description: Tour finance facilities are now available via Access Bank. Apply directly through the Financing tab.

underwriter.title: Insurance Underwriter
underwriter.description: Pan-African insurance leader. 27 markets. All product lines underwritten and managed in-partnership with Ckrowd.

cta.title: Complete certification to activate coverage
cta.description: Insurance products are embedded in the pipeline. No separate application required.

items.q: Do I need to be certified before insurance activates?
items.a: Yes. Insurance coverage activates automatically at Step 4 of the CTaaS certification pipeline. No separate insurance application is required.

items.q: Can I apply for finance before my EOI is approved?
items.a: You can start the process, but finance eligibility is unlocked at Step 5 — after certification and bank onboarding are complete.

items.q: What happens if the event is cancelled?
items.a: Promoter-initiated cancellation triggers the Event Cancellation policy. Claims are processed within 30 days via SanlamAllianz.

items.q: Is a bank account in Africa required?
items.a: Yes. Funds and insurance premiums are routed via Access Bank. The enterprise account is opened as part of the onboarding pipeline.

promoter.description: Concert & event organisers running CTaaS-certified tour stops

steps.label: Submit EOI
steps.detail: Apply for a tour stop via the Discovery page. Complete your Expression of Interest and select your preferred markets.

steps.label: Certification Training
steps.detail: Complete CTaaS LMS certification. Pass the Promoter module to unlock certified partner status.

steps.label: Access Bank Onboarding
steps.detail: Open an Enterprise Account via the Ckrowd partnership with Access Bank. Required for insurance and finance activation.

steps.label: Insurance Activation
steps.detail: SanlamAllianz Business Insurance activates upon certification completion. Coverage includes event cancellation, liability, and credit guarantee.

steps.label: Finance Eligibility
steps.detail: Certified Access Bank account becomes Paymaster-eligible. Tour Stop Advance and Venue Build-Out Credit unlocked.

coverage.desc: Artist withdrawal, weather events, force majeure. Protects full event revenue.
Public liability, property damage, business interruption for the promoter entity.
Underwrites Tour Stop Advance lending facility. Enables Access Bank lending.
Embedded at checkout — refund guarantee for ticket holders if event is cancelled.

workforce.label: Touring Workforce
workforce.description: Sound engineers, lighting crews, stage managers, production staff deployed across tour stops

steps.label: WCS Registration
steps.detail: Register as a Workforce Contractor on Ckrowd. Submit skills, experience, and availability.

steps.label: Vetting & Verification
steps.detail: Skills assessment, reference check, and identity verification completed by Ckrowd operations.

steps.label: Touring Agent Certification
steps.detail: Complete role-specific CTaaS training module. Earn your Touring Agent certification badge.

steps.label: Group Insurance Activation
steps.detail: Personal accident, employer liability, and contractor coverage activated via SanlamAllianz group policy.

steps.label: Cross-Border Deployment
steps.detail: Access cross-border payroll via PAPSS. Deploy to certified tour stops across 27 markets.

coverage.desc: Personal accident and injury coverage for all certified touring workforce members.
Employer liability protection covering workplace injuries and claims.
Professional indemnity and equipment coverage for independent contractors.

steps.label: Vendor EOI
steps.detail: Submit Expression of Interest to supply services to certified tour stops. Specify your category and capacity.

steps.detail: Capacity check, business registration verification, and quality assessment conducted by Ckrowd.

steps.label: Approved Vendor Listing
steps.detail: Listed in Ckrowd Vendor Marketplace and matched to relevant tour stops based on geography and capacity.

steps.label: Insurance Profile Creation
steps.detail: SME business insurance bundle activated via SanlamAllianz. Covers equipment, cargo, and business interruption.

steps.label: Finance Access
steps.detail: Working capital pre-event financing unlocked for approved vendors with certified tour stop contracts.

coverage.desc: Charter aircraft, production equipment, and high-value cargo in transit.
Revenue protection if supply contracts are disrupted due to event cancellation.
Covers service delivery failures and contractual liability claims.

steps.detail: Artist non-appearance and tour liability coverage embedded into performance contracts automatically.

steps.detail: Artist fees routed via certified Paymaster. Milestone-based release tied to performance completion.

coverage.desc: Covers artist cancellation due to illness, injury, or force majeure.
Revenue guarantee product protecting management fees and artist earnings.
Third-party liability arising from artist performance and production activities.

productSuite.name: Event Cancellation and Disruption Protection
productSuite.desc: Covers revenue losses from event cancellation, postponement, and disruption from non-appearance, weather, force majeure, or public safety incidents.

productSuite.name: Public Liability and Audience Safety Coverage
productSuite.desc: Protects promoters against claims arising from bodily injury, property damage, or personal accident involving audience members and third parties at events.

productSuite.name: Touring and Artist Risk Management
productSuite.desc: Comprehensive coverage for touring artists — non-appearance, cancellation due to illness or injury, equipment loss, and reputational risk during a live tour.

productSuite.name: Workforce and Contractor Protection
productSuite.desc: Group personal accident, employer liability, and contractor cover for touring crew, stage staff, security personnel, and all event-related workers.

productSuite.name: Production Equipment and Asset Insurance
productSuite.desc: All-risks cover for lighting rigs, sound systems, staging, instruments, and high-value production assets — in transit, in storage, and on-site.

productSuite.name: Venue and Infrastructure Coverage
productSuite.desc: Property damage, business interruption, and structural liability for permanent and temporary venues, stages, and event infrastructure.

productSuite.name: Ticket Protection and Consumer Assurance Solutions
productSuite.desc: Embedded refund guarantee for ticket holders activated at checkout — covering cancellation, postponement, and inability to attend.

productSuite.name: Sponsor and Brand Activation Risk Solutions
productSuite.desc: Protects sponsor investment in brand activations, experiential events, and naming-rights deals against cancellation, disruption, or audience safety incidents.

productSuite.name: Compliance and Risk Assessment Services
productSuite.desc: Pre-event risk assessments, regulatory compliance checks, and certification support to ensure events meet local safety, licensing, and insurance requirements.

productSuite.name: Data-Driven Insurance Products
productSuite.desc: Parametric and index-linked insurance products priced dynamically using real-time event data — attendance forecasts, weather indices, and artist tour performance metrics.

InsurancePage.howItWorksSubtitle: The CTaaS certification and insurance activation pipeline

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: TourStack by Crowd collects information you provide when you create an account, submit an Expression of Interest, register as a promoter, workforce member, service provider, artist manager, vendor, financier, insurer, or other stakeholder, or communicate with our team. This may include your name, email address, phone or WhatsApp number, country, city, company details, role, credentials, event history, venue information, portfolio links, payment or banking onboarding information, and documents you upload for verification.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use your information to operate TourStack, process applications and EOIs, verify stakeholder credentials, match promoters and partners to tour opportunities, support CTaaS workforce certification, coordinate insurance and finance workflows, provide customer support, improve platform security, and send service updates. We do not sell your personal data.

sections.title: 3. Sharing and Partners
sections.content: We may share relevant information with trusted partners where needed to provide the service, including payment providers, banks, insurance partners, tour operators, verified promoters, service providers, compliance reviewers, hosting providers, analytics tools, and professional advisers. These parties are expected to handle information only for the purposes for which it was shared.

sections.title: 4. Cookies and Local Storage
sections.content: TourStack may use cookies, localStorage, and similar technologies to keep you signed in, remember preferences, protect sessions, measure usage, and improve performance. Some features may not work correctly if these technologies are disabled.

sections.title: 5. Data Security and Retention
sections.content: We use administrative, technical, and organizational safeguards designed to protect personal information against unauthorized access, loss, misuse, or alteration. We retain information for as long as needed to operate the platform, meet legal or contractual obligations, resolve disputes, prevent fraud, and maintain accurate business records.

sections.title: 6. International Transfers
sections.content: Because TourStack supports cross-border live-event activity, your information may be processed in countries other than the country where you are located. Where required, we take reasonable steps to protect transferred information in line with applicable data protection requirements.

sections.title: 7. Your Choices and Rights
sections.content: Depending on your location, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, restrict, or object to certain processing of your personal information. You may also request a copy of information associated with your account or ask us to update inaccurate records.

sections.title: 8. Contact
sections.content: For privacy-related enquiries, contact us at {contactLink} or email {email}.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using TourStack by Crowd, you agree to these Terms of Service and any policies referenced in them. If you are using TourStack on behalf of a company or organization, you confirm that you have authority to bind that organization. If you do not agree, you may not use the platform.

sections.title: 2. The TourStack Platform
sections.content: TourStack is a B2B platform operated by Ckrowd Africa Technologies for the Pan-African live events ecosystem. The platform supports tour discovery, Expressions of Interest, promoter and venue onboarding, workforce registration, service-provider workflows, artist-management coordination, insurance pathways, financing workflows, and related ecosystem services.

sections.title: 3. Eligibility and Accounts
sections.content: You must provide accurate, current, and complete information when registering, submitting forms, uploading credentials, or representing a business, venue, artist roster, workforce profile, or financing request. You are responsible for keeping your account credentials secure and for activity that occurs under your account.

sections.title: 4. Verification and Platform Decisions
sections.content: Ckrowd may review, verify, approve, reject, pause, or remove accounts, EOIs, listings, credentials, financing requests, workforce profiles, or partner submissions where information is incomplete, inaccurate, unverifiable, suspicious, or inconsistent with platform standards. Platform access does not guarantee tour allocation, financing approval, insurance coverage, certification, or commercial engagement.

sections.title: 5. Acceptable Use
sections.content: You agree not to misuse TourStack, interfere with platform security, submit false or misleading information, impersonate another person or entity, upload unlawful or infringing material, scrape or reverse engineer the platform, or use TourStack to facilitate fraud, harassment, discrimination, unsafe events, or unlawful transactions.

sections.title: 6. Commercial Relationships
sections.content: TourStack may help stakeholders discover opportunities and exchange information, but commercial terms between promoters, artists, vendors, financiers, insurers, venues, and workforce members may be governed by separate agreements. Unless expressly stated in a signed agreement, Ckrowd is not a party to those separate commercial commitments.

sections.title: 7. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All TourStack branding, platform design, software, content, workflows, scoring logic, and related materials are owned by Ckrowd Africa Technologies or its licensors. You retain ownership of materials you submit, but you grant Ckrowd a limited right to use them to operate, verify, display, route, and improve the platform.

sections.title: 8. Availability and Changes
sections.content: We may update, suspend, restrict, or discontinue parts of TourStack at any time, including features, forms, eligibility criteria, partner workflows, pricing, and verification processes. We aim to keep the platform reliable, but we do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free service.

sections.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: To the fullest extent permitted by law, TourStack is provided on an as-is and as-available basis. Ckrowd will not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, punitive, or loss-of-profit damages arising from platform use, stakeholder decisions, third-party services, event outcomes, or unavailable features.

sections.title: 10. Contact
sections.content: For terms-related enquiries, visit our {contactLink} or email {email}.

step2.title: Submit Your EOI
step2.description: Submit a formal Expression of Interest with your venue, date, budget, and funding plan.

step3.title: Matching & Review
step3.description: Ckrowd scores your EOI against artiste requirements and reviews your application.

step4.title: Decision & Execution
step4.description: You receive Approved, Rejected, or Needs Revision — then proceed to planning.

financing.title: Financing Support Available
financing.description: Get up to 40% of the artiste fee covered upfront through TourStack's capital partners.

hero.title: Capital for <spanNode>Every Tour Stop.</spanNode>
hero.description: Purpose-built financing for promoters across Africa — so cash flow never stands between you and a great show.

noApplications.title: No applications yet
noApplications.description: Browse our financing products below and apply to cover your event costs.

p1.name: Tour Stop Advance
p1.description: Get up to 40% of the agreed artiste fee covered before the event date. Repaid automatically from gate receipts.

p2.name: Venue Build-Out Credit
p2.description: Finance staging, sound, lighting, and production upgrades needed to host a qualifying tour stop.

p3.name: Event Insurance Bundle
p3.description: Comprehensive cover for cancellation, adverse weather, public liability, and artiste no-show.

p4.name: Marketing & Ticketing Float
p4.description: Unlock working capital to run pre-event marketing and cover ticketing platform fees before revenue lands.

s1.title: Submit EOI
s1.description: Apply for a tour stop on the Discovery page. A confirmed EOI unlocks financing eligibility.

s2.title: Select Product
s2.description: Choose the financing product that fits your event budget and timeline.

s3.title: Upload Documents
s3.description: Submit venue contract, projected gate receipts, and ID verification.

s4.title: Decision in 48h
s4.description: Our capital partners review and issue a term sheet within two business days.

s5.title: Funds Disbursed
s5.description: Approved funds land in your account before the event build-out deadline.

cta.title: Ready to Unlock Funding?

FinancingPage.faqSubtitle: Answers to the most common financing questions.

f1.q: Do I need a bank account in Africa to qualify?
f1.a: Yes. Funds are disbursed to a verified business account in the country of the tour stop. We support accounts in 18 African markets.

f2.q: Can I apply for financing before my EOI is approved?
f2.a: You can start your financing profile at any time, but funds will only be released once your EOI is marked Approved by Ckrowd.

f3.q: What happens if the event is cancelled?
f3.a: Cancellation triggered by the artiste is covered by the Event Insurance Bundle. Promoter-initiated cancellations are subject to the repayment schedule in your term sheet.

f4.q: Is there a minimum event budget to qualify?
f4.a: Tour Stop Advance requires a minimum confirmed artiste fee of $5,000. Other products have their own thresholds as shown above.

step0.title: 🗺️ Tour Opportunities
step0.description: This is where you discover live artist tours looking for promoters. Every card is a real booking opportunity.

step1.title: 🎛️ Filter Tours
step1.description: Narrow down by genre, availability window, fee range, or region to find tours that fit your market.

step2.title: 🎵 Browse Artist Cards
step2.description: Each card shows the artist, tour name, dates, fee range, and target markets. Click any card or 'Submit EOI' to apply.

step3.title: 📋 How It Works
step3.description: Follow these 4 steps — browse, express interest, get matched, and confirm your tour stop.

step4.title: ✅ Ready to Apply?
step4.description: Click 'Submit Expression of Interest' on any artist to start your application. It takes under 3 minutes.

step0.title: 🎫 My Tour Stops
step0.description: This is your personal booking pipeline — all your applications and confirmed shows in one view.

step1.title: 📊 Your Pipeline Stats
step1.description: These four numbers show your total stops, confirmed shows, applications in progress, and rejections.

step2.title: ⏳ Pending Applications
step2.description: EOIs awaiting admin review appear here. You'll get an email notification when the status changes.

step3.title: 📋 Your Tour Cards
step3.description: Each card shows the artist, venue, date, status, and fee. Click 'View Details' for the full breakdown and milestones.

step0.title: 📝 Submit an EOI
step0.description: An Expression of Interest lets you apply to host an artist at your venue. It's a 3-step process.

step1.title: 1️⃣ Pick an Artist
step1.description: Browse the list of available tours on the left and select one to apply for. You can search by name.

step2.title: 2️⃣ Complete the Form
step2.description: Enter your company info, city, expected audience size, and any notes for the booking team.

step3.title: 3️⃣ Review & Submit
step3.description: On the final step, review all your details before submitting. You'll receive a confirmation email straight away.

step0.title: 💰 Tour Financing
step0.description: TourStack financing helps promoters cover upfront costs — artist deposits, venue build-out, marketing, and more.

step1.title: ⚡ Quick Apply
step1.description: Start here to check your eligibility and see which products you qualify for in real time.

step2.title: 🏦 Financing Products
step2.description: Choose from multiple products offered by our partner banks. Each shows the amount, term, and cost at a glance.

step0.title: 🛡️ Event Insurance
step0.description: Protect your events with insurance products tailored for live music — from cancellation cover to audience ticket protection.

step1.title: 📦 Insurance Products
step1.description: Browse available products. Each card shows coverage type, amount, and how to apply.

step2.title: ✅ Apply in Minutes
step2.description: Select a product and apply directly through the Financing tab. Your cover is linked to your tour stop.

step0.title: 🏠 Your Dashboard
step0.description: Welcome to your TourStack dashboard — your personalised overview of tour activity, EOIs, and milestones.

step1.title: 📊 Stats
step1.description: Your key numbers at a glance — active tours, pending EOIs, and upcoming milestones.

step2.title: 📋 Pending EOIs
step2.description: EOIs you've submitted that are still awaiting admin review or need revision.

step3.title: 🚀 Next Steps
step3.description: Use the sidebar to navigate to Discovery to find new opportunities, or check your Tour Stops for updates.

step0.title: 🎛️ Admin Overview
step0.description: Your command centre — a live snapshot of platform activity, tour stops, and promoter applications.

step1.title: 📊 Platform Stats
step1.description: Click any stat card to jump directly to the relevant management section.

step2.title: 🎫 Recent Tour Stops
step2.description: The latest confirmed and pending tour stops. Click 'View detail' to manage any stop.

step3.title: 📥 Recent EOIs
step3.description: The latest promoter submissions. Head to EOI Management to review and process them.

step0.title: 📥 EOI Management
step0.description: All Expression of Interest submissions from promoters across the platform, newest first.

step1.title: 📋 Review Each Submission
step1.description: Each card shows the promoter, artist, venue, estimated capacity, budget, and match score.

step2.title: ⚡ Take Action
step2.description: Use the action buttons to Approve, Request Revision, Reject, or directly Create a Tour Stop from any EOI.

step0.title: 🎫 Tour Stop Management
step0.description: All confirmed and in-progress tour stops on the platform.

step1.title: 📋 Tour Stop List
step1.description: Each row shows the artist, status, and a menu to view details, edit, or delete the stop.

step2.title: ➕ Create New
step2.description: Use the 'Create Tour' button to add a new artist tour project to the Discovery catalog.

step0.title: 👋 Welcome to TourStack!
step0.description: Your all-in-one platform for connecting with global artist tours across Africa. This quick tour will show you where everything is — takes less than 2 minutes.

step1.title: 🔍 Discover Tour Opportunities
step1.description: Browse live artist tours available for hosting. Filter by genre, region, and fee range to find the perfect match for your market.

step2.title: 🎫 My Tour Stops
step2.description: Track every Expression of Interest you've submitted. See status updates, revision requests, and confirmed bookings all in one place.

step3.title: 💰 Financing
step3.description: Need funding to bring an artist to your city? Apply for tour finance from our partner banks — tour advances, venue build-out credit, and more.

step4.title: 🛡️ Insurance
step4.description: Protect your events with tailored insurance products — event cancellation, credit guarantees, audience ticket protection, and more.

step5.title: 🚀 Ready to Get Started?
step5.description: Click here to browse available artists and submit your first Expression of Interest. It only takes a few minutes!

step6.title: ✅ You're All Set!
step6.description: You now know your way around TourStack. Click 'Platform Tour' at the bottom of the sidebar anytime to replay this guide. Good luck!

step0.title: 👋 Welcome to TourStack Admin!
step0.description: This is your command centre for managing the TourStack platform. Let's walk through the key sections.

step1.title: 📥 EOI Submissions
step1.description: Review and process Expression of Interest submissions from promoters. Approve, request revisions, reject, or convert to a confirmed tour stop.

step2.title: 🎫 Tour Stops
step2.description: View and manage all confirmed and pending tour stops. Each stop is linked to the promoter's EOI and can be edited or deleted.

step3.title: 🎵 Artists
step3.description: Manage the artist catalog that promoters browse on the Discovery page. Add new artists, update tour details, fee ranges, and availability windows.

step4.title: 📊 Reports
step4.description: Track platform performance — EOI volumes, conversion rates, financing uptake, and revenue analytics.

step5.title: ➕ Create Tour Project
step5.description: Publish a new artist tour project to attract promoter applications. Fill in the artist, fee range, tour window, and region.

step6.title: ✅ You're All Set!
step6.description: You know your way around the admin portal. Click 'Platform Tour' at the bottom of the sidebar anytime to replay this guide.

Metadata.title: Tourstack by Ckrowd
Metadata.description: Tourstack by Ckrowd connects artists, promoters, and financiers on a single high-performance stage.

hero.title: Africa's Live Music Industry — Powered by People Like You
hero.description: TourStack aggregates the live music ecosystem across Africa. Join the network that connects promoters, service providers, crew, and artist managers for financing, insurance, and cross-border opportunities.
hero.statLabel: Available trade financing for eligible members

stats.title: Africa has 1.4 billion music fans. Almost no one earns from concerts — yet.
stats.subtitle: The demand is proven. What's missing is the infrastructure to fund, insure and organise it. That is what you are joining.

model.title: Concert Touring as a Service
model.subtitle: TourStack brings every person and every dollar a tour needs onto one platform. Four steps turn the live music industry into a bankable, insurable ecosystem — and each one builds on the last.

certify.title: Get certified
certify.body: Register and complete your profile to earn verified status — the industry credential that unlocks everything else.

bank.title: Get banked
bank.body: Certified members are onboarded into the formal financial system, becoming traceable, fundable businesses.

finance.title: Get financed
finance.body: Access working capital and tour financing against confirmed contracts and real promoter invoices.

operate.title: Operate on TourStack
operate.body: Hiring, payroll, contracts and payments run through one platform, across every market, in real time.

about.title: The business intelligence platform for Africa's live music industry
about.body: TourStack is built by Ckrowd to aggregate every professional in Africa's live music ecosystem — from the staging company in Lagos to the tour manager in Nairobi. We collect structured data so that promoters, banks, and insurance companies can make faster, smarter decisions about who to work with and where to operate.

data.title: A continent-wide directory
data.body: Every person and company that registers becomes part of a searchable, verified database — queryable by country, city, category, and service type.

finance.title: Access to trade financing
finance.body: Onboarded members are eligible for invoice discounting and working capital — backed by real invoices from real promoters.

insurance.title: Group insurance rates
insurance.body: Because we negotiate for the entire ecosystem at once, members access event insurance at rates they could not get on their own.

training.title: Standardised training & certification
training.body: Earn portable certification that proves your competence — recognised across every TourStack market, so a credential earned in Ghana also works in South Africa.

register.title: Fill out your profile
register.body: Choose your role and complete the onboarding form. The questions are tailored to your category — a company or an individual, a manager or a technician.

verified.title: Get listed in the directory
verified.body: Your profile becomes part of the TourStack searchable database — visible to promoters, financiers, and partners across Africa.

opportunities.title: Unlock financing and opportunities
opportunities.body: A complete profile is the condition for accessing TourStack financing, insurance, and cross-border concert opportunities. Being onboarded is the starting point.

roles.title: Who are you in the live music industry?
roles.subtitle: Select your category below. Each path has a different set of questions — because what we need to know about a sound company is very different from what we need to know about a tour manager.
roles.noTokensNotice: No onboarding link detected. Ask the promoter who invited you to share their ecosystem invite link.

service.title: Service Provider
service.tagline: Companies and enterprises that supply to concerts
service.description: If your business supplies goods, equipment, or services to concerts and festivals — this is your path. Service providers are companies and enterprises, not individuals. You will be asked about your business registration, service category, geographic coverage, and past clients.
benefits: Listed in the TourStack directory — discoverable by promoters across Africa
Eligible for invoice discounting when you hold a promoter invoice
Access to group event insurance at negotiated rates
Verified business profile that builds trust with new clients

workforce.title: Crew and Workforce
workforce.tagline: Individual professionals who work live events
workforce.description: If you are an individual who works on concerts and festivals — a technician, manager, driver, or any hands-on role — this is your path. Workforce members are people, not companies. You will be asked about your skills, experience level, touring availability, and past events.
benefits: Verified individual profile — your work history and skills on record
Discoverable by promoters and production companies across Africa
Eligible for individual event insurance through TourStack
Cross-border work opportunities as TourStack expands to new markets

artmgmt.title: Artist Management
artmgmt.tagline: Managers and agencies who book and tour artists
artmgmt.description: If you manage artists or run a management company that books tours across Africa — this is your path. You will be asked about your roster size, the genres you work with, markets you operate in, and your deal structures.
benefits: Profile your artists and agency in the TourStack directory
Connect with promoters looking for artists across multiple African markets
Negotiate touring deals at scale — TourStack negotiates in bulk across countries
Access financing options for tour advances and production costs

markets.title: One ecosystem, twenty-five markets
markets.body: TourStack is rolling out across Africa in two phases. Wherever you register, your verified profile travels with you as the platform reaches new countries — so the work you do today compounds across the continent.
markets.phase1: Abidjan · Dakar · Conakry · Bamako · Douala · Libreville · Brazzaville · Kinshasa
markets.phase2: Nigeria · Ghana · Kenya · South Africa · Tanzania · Angola · Mozambique and more

vision.title: Building the data infrastructure for Africa's live music economy
vision.body: Every concert on the African continent generates economic activity — from the staging company to the ticketing agent to the hotel booking. TourStack captures that data so it can be turned into intelligence.
vision.body2: Promoters use our data to plan better. Banks use it to underwrite financing. Insurance companies use it to price risk. Sponsors use it to find the right audiences. The more ecosystem members onboard, the more powerful the platform becomes — for everyone.

promoters.title: Promoters
promoters.body: Find vetted service providers and crew for every market in the directory.

banks.title: Banks and Financiers
banks.body: Use onboarding data to underwrite financing for promoters and vendors.

insurance.title: Insurance Companies
insurance.body: Use verified profiles to price and issue group event insurance policies.

sponsors.title: Sponsors and Brands
sponsors.body: Use ecosystem data to find audiences and partners in target markets.

footer.tagline: TourStack by Ckrowd — building Africa's live music ecosystem

inviteEcosystem.title: Invite Your Ecosystem
